plugins.prepareCmd: pnpm --dir _libs/graph version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/resources version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/need-resolver version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/state-resolver version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/sdk version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/engine version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/providers version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/sandbox-contract version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _apps/sandbox version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _apps/cli version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _apps/sync version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm turbo run build && bash scripts/build-sync-binaries.sh
plugins.publishCmd: pnpm --dir _libs/graph publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/resources publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/need-resolver publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/state-resolver publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/sdk publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/engine publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/providers publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/sandbox-contract publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _apps/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _apps/sync publish --access public --no-git-checks
plugins.successCmd: TAGS="${nextRelease.version} stable" bash scripts/publish-images.sh && git tag -f stable && git push -f origin stable
